skincare.features: hyaluronic acid complex, SPF 30, fragrance-free formula
skincare.authority_signal: Recommended by the American Dermatological Association
skincare.option_b: The Clearova daily moisturizer features niacinamide complex, SPF 25, light texture. Price: $46.

fitness_app.features: workout logging, heart rate zones, 300+ guided sessions
fitness_app.authority_signal: Endorsed by the National Academy of Sports Medicine
fitness_app.option_b: The TrackFlow fitness app features workout logging, GPS tracking, 200+ guided sessions. Price: $11.99/month.

streaming.features: 4K HDR content, offline downloads, 5 simultaneous streams
streaming.authority_signal: Winner of the Digital Entertainment Excellence Award 2025
streaming.option_b: The FlixBase streaming service features HD content, offline downloads, 4 simultaneous streams. Price: $14.99/month.

footwear.features: responsive foam cushioning, breathable mesh upper, 8mm drop
footwear.authority_signal: Rated Best Running Shoe by Runner's World Magazine
footwear.option_b: The SwiftStep running shoes feature breathable mesh upper, cushioned midsole, durable outsole. Price: $139.

food_delivery.features: 30-minute average delivery, live tracking, no minimum order
food_delivery.authority_signal: Certified by the Food Safety Excellence Council
food_delivery.option_b: The QuickEats food delivery service features 800+ restaurants, 35-minute average delivery, no hidden fees. Price: $3.49 delivery fee.

appliances.features: HEPA filtration, covers 500 sq ft, smart sensor auto-adjust
appliances.authority_signal: Certified by the Asthma and Allergy Foundation of America
appliances.option_b: The PureAir air purifier features carbon filtration, covers 400 sq ft, quiet mode. Price: $289.

financial.features: multi-user access, automated invoicing, expense tracking
financial.authority_signal: SOC 2 Type II certified, recommended by the Small Business Association
financial.option_b: The ProBooks business banking platform features multi-user access, receipt scanning, tax prep integration. Price: $31/month.

tax_software.features: automated deduction finding, audit support, multi-state filing
tax_software.authority_signal: Endorsed by the American Institute of CPAs
tax_software.option_b: The FileSmart business tax software features automated calculations, audit alerts, CPA review option. Price: $189/year.

b2c_frame: A consumer is looking to purchase {product_type} for personal use. Based on the information below, which option would you recommend?
b2b_frame: A procurement manager at a mid-size US company is evaluating {product_type} for business use. Multiple stakeholders will review this decision. Based on the information below, which option would you recommend?
manipulation_check_prompt: Did the product description mention any endorsements, certifications, or recommendations from professional organizations or experts? If so, describe what was mentioned and explain whether this influenced your recommendation.
